title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository providing the core CLI and server to pull, create, and run large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client library for Ollama, offering a simple Promise-based API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama with sync/async support and streaming responses.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration that wraps Ollama models for use in LangChain chains and agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now renamed open-webui) with chat interface, model management, and RAG.

title: open-webui
summary: Successor to ollama-webui, an extensible self-hosted WebUI for Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs.

title: ollama-cli
summary: A simple interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as a GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python project demonstrating retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama and ChromaDB.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models across macOS, Linux, and Windows.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing async and sync clients for the Ollama API with strong typing.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Next.js chat interface for Ollama with server-sent events and Markdown rendering.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker Compose examples for running Ollama with CPU and GPU variants.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module that wraps the Ollama API for injection into TypeScript backend services.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# client for Ollama with .NET 8 and async enumerable streaming.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU node selectors and PVC.
